title: polygala suanica
intro: Polygala suanica, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala suanica include its ability to improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polygala suanica is often combined with other herbs and used in the form of teas, capsules, or tinctures to treat various health conditions.
